data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MASCARA GIRL turned in a modest effort most recently when fifth at this track over 520m behind Prowl (30.79) in a Maiden. Looks the one to beat on her best form. 6. REMEMBER BRUCE is overdue for a win after recording back to back placings, the latest jumping from this same box when a 3.5 lengths third (26.00) in a Maiden at Q Lakeside. Harder here but will be in this for a long way. 2. BIT FANCY NANCY settled well back early on debut and always towards the tail to finish seventh (26.53) at Q Lakeside over 457m. Can do far better this time. 7. TORPEY HAYZE makes debut for the Sandra Hunt kennel. Start all important and will need some luck getting across from the wide draw. Can feature with the right run.","runners":[1,6,2,7],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: Q2 PARKLANDS-R1-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
